inputs.label: Workday Bedtime
inputs.businessContext: Typical bedtime on workdays, in decimal hours (e.g., 23.5 = 11:30 PM)

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical bedtime on workdays, in decimal hours (e.g., 23.5 = 11:30 PM)
businessContext_i18n.tr: İş günlerinde tipik yatma saati, ondalık saat cinsinden (ör. 23,5 = 23:30)

inputs.label: Free Day Bedtime
inputs.businessContext: Typical bedtime on free days, in decimal hours (e.g., 0 = midnight, 1.5 = 1:30 AM)
